detail.statusTitle: Your artwork is in the queue for evaluation.

detail.uploadSuccess: New artwork uploaded! Your previous image has been replaced successfully.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.paragraph1: If you approve the final proof and confirm your payment after 5:00PM, the order will be processed the next business day.
terms.paragraph2: We normally check the important details required for production. The correction of the design content, such as misspelling, is not subject to reproduction.
terms.paragraph3: In spite of the most modern printing machines, color difference of 5-10% and movement of 1-2mm on the actual sticker product should be acceptable due to mechanical tolerances.
terms.turnaroundNote: The estimated turnaround time includes printing & delivery.
terms.bumperStickerPrintNote: Bumper Sticker is printed using digital printing. The printing resolution is lower than offset printing.
terms.materialCurlNote: Due to the characteristics of the material, the sticker may curl up after time. Choose coated option to avoid this issue.
terms.cancellationBody: Order cancellations are only allowed during 'Before Production' status; once the status changes to 'In Production,' cancellations are disabled as printing has begun, so please review your order carefully beforehand.

instructions.default: Please make sure the colors and size is exactly perfect.
